responsibilities: Conduct primary and secondary research to support client engagements across strategy, operations, and organizational design projects
Build financial and operational models in Excel to analyze business performance and quantify potential improvement opportunities
Develop polished PowerPoint presentations synthesizing analysis into clear, client-ready insights and recommendations
Support senior consultants in structuring problems using hypothesis-driven frameworks to guide engagement workstreams
Conduct interviews with client stakeholders to gather qualitative insights informing strategic and operational recommendations
Analyze industry benchmarks and competitive data to contextualize client performance against market peers
Assist in project management activities including timeline tracking, deliverable coordination, and status reporting
Contribute to internal knowledge-building by documenting case learnings and best practices for future engagements
